REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (645 Haight St. #17 Aka #7b, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence C. Beaver, attorney for petitioner; Daniel Frank (proposed buyer); Kurt Green (agent for proposed buyer).
Mr. Beaver stated that the broker agreed to remit any sales commission in excess of 5%, and that the commission should be limited to that amount. He further stated that no further notice was required, as Mr. Frank was present and waived further notice.

The sale was confirmed at $725,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale, filed May 27, 2015. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The Court found that no additional bond is required.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
